description: CompositionRust coloured round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, brand badge on the left side and branding in graphic print and appliqué FitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on embellishmentsWear your brand on your tee with this stylish t-shirt from wrangler. The short sleeves fit snug on your well toned arms, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable in all seasons. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for unparalleled cool.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
